description_long: This is a monumental bank building with a tall, rectangular central tower rising from a broad, tiered base. The structure is set on a landscaped platform with green grass borders and a brown walkway leading up to a wide staircase. The facade of the tower features a large, raised dollar sign symbol, emphasizing its financial function. The base includes a series of small, evenly spaced rectangular windows and is surrounded by low hedges and decorative plants. The overall design is symmetrical, with clean lines and a solid, imposing presence, suggesting security and stability.
description: A tall, rectangular bank building with a prominent dollar sign on its facade, set atop a landscaped, tiered base with stairs and greenery.
description_view_0: The front view shows the main staircase, landscaped hedges, and the large dollar sign prominently displayed on the tower.
description_view_1: This view is similar to the front but slightly rotated, revealing more of the right side of the base and the continuation of the hedges.
description_view_2: The rear view displays the back of the tower and base, with the dollar sign still visible but less emphasis on the entrance.
description_view_3: This view shows the left side of the building, highlighting the symmetry of the landscaping and the tiered base.
attribute_signage: A large, raised dollar sign symbol is centered on the upper facade of the tower, occupying most of the vertical space and serving as the primary signage.
attribute_entrance_design: The main entrance features a wide staircase leading to a set of double doors, likely made of metal and glass, framed by a solid, rectangular stone or concrete surround with minimal decorative elements.
